content:
You are an expert Minecraft Java developer with deep knowledge of
Paper API, Bukkit, Spigot internals, async-safe programming,
event-driven architecture, and large SMP server optimization.

Your task is to create a FULLY FUNCTIONAL, PRODUCTION-READY
Minecraft Paper plugin for versions 1.21 – 1.21.4.

────────────────────────────────────
PLUGIN NAME
────────────────────────────────────
Name: SMPGenesis
Version: 1.0.0
API: Paper / Bukkit
Java: Java 21
Compatibility: Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.4
Performance: Lag-free, async optimized

────────────────────────────────────
PLUGIN PURPOSE
────────────────────────────────────
This plugin is designed to allow SMP admins to professionally
START and MANAGE an SMP with advanced event systems including:

• SMP start command
• Grace period system
• World border control
• SMP start timer
• First join protection (toggleable)
• Starter kit
• Advanced knockback + ash particles during grace
• Fully configurable config.yml
• Modular, expandable codebase

────────────────────────────────────
CORE COMMANDS
────────────────────────────────────

/smp start
/smp stop
/smp timer
/smp grace on
/smp grace off
/smp border shrink
/smp reload
/smp status

Permissions:
smp.admin
smp.start
smp.reload

────────────────────────────────────
SMP START FLOW (VERY IMPORTANT)
────────────────────────────────────
When an admin executes `/smp start`:

1. SMP status switches to ACTIVE
2. SMP timer starts (BossBar + ActionBar)
3. Grace period begins
4. World border shrinks from large size to start size
5. Starter kit is given to all online players
6. First join protection activates (if enabled)
7. Server-wide broadcast with title + sound
8. Log all actions in console

────────────────────────────────────
TIMER SYSTEM
────────────────────────────────────
• SMP timer must:
  - Run every second
  - Be shown via BossBar
  - Be configurable
  - Pause if server reloads
• Format:
  HH:MM:SS
• Stored persistently in data.yml

────────────────────────────────────
WORLD BORDER SYSTEM
────────────────────────────────────
• Configurable:
  - start-size
  - end-size
  - shrink-time (seconds)
• Smooth shrinking using Paper API
• Starts automatically on /smp start

────────────────────────────────────
GRACE PERIOD SYSTEM
────────────────────────────────────
• Duration configurable in config.yml
• During grace:
  - PvP damage = 0 OR reduced
  - If player hits another player:
      → Custom knockback applied
      → Player feels the hit (strong push)
      → Ash particles spawn
      → Hit sound plays
• NO DAMAGE should be dealt
• Grace end:
  - Broadcast message
  - PvP enabled fully

────────────────────────────────────
KNOCKBACK SYSTEM (ADVANCED)
────────────────────────────────────
• Custom knockback calculation:
  - Direction based on attacker yaw
  - Vertical boost configurable
  - Horizontal force configurable
• Must feel strong but not abusive
• Config options:
  knockback:
    horizontal: 1.2
    vertical: 0.4

────────────────────────────────────
PARTICLE SYSTEM
────────────────────────────────────
• Particle used: ASH
• Spawn particles at hit location
• Amount configurable
• Should look cinematic

────────────────────────────────────
FIRST JOIN PROTECTION
────────────────────────────────────
• Config toggle: true / false
• If enabled:
  - New players cannot be damaged
  - Protection lasts X minutes
  - Message shown on join
• Automatically removed after time

────────────────────────────────────
STARTER KIT SYSTEM
────────────────────────────────────
• Given on SMP start
• Given on first join (optional)
• Fully configurable items
• Supports:
  - Enchantments
  - Custom names
  - Lore

────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG.YML (MANDATORY)
────────────────────────────────────
Generate a full config.yml including:

smp:
  auto-start: false

grace:
  enabled: true
  duration: 15m

world-border:
  start-size: 5000
  end-size: 1000
  shrink-time: 1800

knockback:
  horizontal: 1.2
  vertical: 0.4

particles:
  type: ASH
  amount: 20

first-join-protection:
  enabled: true
  duration: 10m

starter-kit:
  enabled: true
  items:
    - type: IRON_SWORD
    - type: BREAD
      amount: 16

────────────────────────────────────
CODE REQUIREMENTS
────────────────────────────────────
• Use clean package structure
• Use listeners for events
• Use managers:
  - SMPManager
  - GraceManager
  - TimerManager
  - BorderManager
  - ProtectionManager
• No deprecated API
• Async-safe schedulers
• Comments on EVERY major section
• Optimized for 100+ players
• NO memory leaks

────────────────────────────────────
FILES TO GENERATE
────────────────────────────────────
1. plugin.yml
2. config.yml
3. data.yml
4. Main plugin class
5. All managers
6. Event listeners
7. Command executor
8. Utility classes

────────────────────────────────────
OUTPUT FORMAT
────────────────────────────────────
• Provide FULL SOURCE CODE
• Provide FULL FILE STRUCTURE
• Each file clearly labeled
• Ready to compile with Maven or Gradle

────────────────────────────────────
IMPORTANT
────────────────────────────────────
This plugin MUST compile without errors.
Do NOT skip any feature.
Do NOT simplify logic.
Treat this as a real SMP production plugin and also add 10 more features from you

END OF PROMPT
